body:
1. Public Meeting Call to Order, 6:00 PM – Chairman
2. Invocation
3. Pledge of Allegiance
4. Roll Call: Miriam Hill, Sec/Treasurer-District 1; Scott Moore, Vice Chair-District 2; Justin Taylor, District 3; Ray Nelson, Chair-District 4; Mike Cole, District 5
5. Welcome Guests (Chair)
6. Public Comments on non-agenda items (Comments submitted prior to the meeting, limit 3 minutes per speaker)
7. Presentation

   * Port Operator presentation (Port Priority List)
   * FDOT Presentation (Funding Opportunity, Study Analysis report)
8. Approval of Minutes

   * April 8, 2026
   * April 22, 2026
9. OHPA Attorney Report
10. OHPA Accountant Report

    * Financial report – April 2026
11. Port Operator Report

    * Tonnage and Facility Use Fee Reports – April 2026
    * Facilities Report/Port repair update
    * New Business Report (Relay’s Commercial Director)
12. Old Business (Public comments permitted. Limit 3 minutes per speaker)

    * Website Redesign (Updates)
    * Fabric Warehouse (Updates)
    * Extended Layberthing and Handling Agreement (MOU, Action item)
    * PILOT payment (Projection FY 2026-27, Tariff)
    * Records request (by OHPA Commissioners, Relay records)
13. New Business (Public comments permitted. Limit 3 minutes per speaker)

    * Crane 9 (Cable installation, Res. 2026-R05 CIMR for Maintenance Dredging)
    * SeaHUB and PIDP applications (APTIM Proposal)
14. Office Manager Report
15. Port Commissioner Items (Other business to come before the Board)
16.  Adjournment
